Investment Return Calculator

Calculate your investment returns and growth. Enter your initial investment, final value, and time period to see ROI and annualized returns.

FAQ

What is ROI?

Return on Investment (ROI) measures the gain or loss relative to the initial investment. ROI = (Final Value - Initial Investment) / Initial Investment × 100%.

What is annualized return?

Annualized return converts total return to a yearly rate, allowing comparison of investments held for different periods.

What is a good ROI?

The S&P 500 has historically returned about 10% annually before inflation. A 'good' ROI depends on risk level and investment type.
